items.name: Blue Mardi Gras Mask
items.description: Popular practices included wearing masks and costumes, overturning social conventions, dancing, sports competitions, parades, etc. Similar expressions to Mardi Gras appear in other European languages sharing the Christian tradition. In English, the day is called Shrove Tuesday, associated with the religious requirement for confession before Lent begins.

items.name: Hypercooled Aquavision Goggles
items.description: These are hypercooled so that you can look through lava.  Reese has to use them once a week when she climbs Lava Mountain.  She'll confirm that they're great for everyday lava protection.

items.name: Inventor's Goggles
items.description: The world thinks he's crazy, but he'll show them!

items.name: Fancy Goggles
items.description: Sure. You could get plain goggles.  But where's the fun in that?

items.name: Green Crazy Fuzzy Neon Goggles
